title: Version 2.1.63 - Multiple slash commands and memory improvements
description: Added /simplify and /batch bundled slash commands, HTTP hooks for external integrations, and extensive memory leak fixes across the platform (20+ fixes).

title: Version 1.3.32 - MCP App support and cn checks
description: Added limited MCP App support, cn checks CLI command, enabled agent mode for LM Studio models, updated default model to Claude Opus 4.6, and consolidated React best practices.

title: Cloud Agents with Computer Use
description: Cloud agents can now use the software they create to test changes and demo their work, producing merge-ready PRs with artifacts (videos, screenshots, and logs). Available on web, desktop, mobile, Slack, and GitHub.

community_feedback.quote: A new era has begun - Cloud Agents break previous limitations

title: Bugbot Autofix with Cloud Agents
description: Bugbot can automatically fix issues it finds in pull requests using cloud agents that run in isolated VMs with full development environments. Over 35% of autofix changes are merged into base PRs. Resolution rate increased from 52% to 76%.

community_feedback.quote: Can significantly improve efficiency - You submit a PR, wake up the next morning, and Bugbot has already fixed 10 small issues
Over-reliance might cause developers to lose code understanding. Risk of blindly accepting fixes without reviewing

title: Version 2.1.59 - Auto-memory and /copy command
description: Claude automatically saves useful context to auto-memory with /memory management. Added /copy command with interactive picker for code blocks.

community_feedback.quote: How to turn it off - the most discussed topic was disabling auto memory
Claude writes to Memory.md instead of fixing bugs - user reported it responded 'okay, won't happen again' and wrote a note without actually fixing the code
Performance degradation - users reported that filling the context window with memories actually makes Claude perform worse
It solves the cross-session memory pain point. No more manual CLAUDE.md maintenance

title: Aider v0.86.0 Release
description: Aider released v0.86.0 adding support for all GPT-5 models, Grok-4 via xAI, Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite Preview, and UI improvements including /clear confirmation and /undo formatting enhancements.

community_feedback.quote: GPT-5 achieved 88% accuracy on the Aider Polyglot code editing benchmark, significantly higher than GPT-4o's 25.8%

title: Claude Code Security Module Release
description: Anthropic released the Claude Code Security module for the web version, combining automated scanning with human-like analysis to identify business logic defects, access control issues, and other security vulnerabilities. Uses multi-stage verification to filter false positives.

community_feedback.quote: Cybersecurity stocks crashed: CrowdStrike -8%, Cloudflare -8%, Okta -9%, sector market cap evaporated by over $10 billion in one day
Claude Code Security: AI猎杀代码漏洞时代正式开启

title: Version 2.1.50 - Major Bug Fixes
description: Added support for startupTimeout configuration for LSP servers, WorktreeCreate and WorktreeRemove hook events. Fixed critical bugs: resumed sessions visibility with symlinks, session data loss on SSH disconnect, memory leaks in agent teams and LSP diagnostics, and native module loading on older glibc systems.

title: Gemini 3.1 Pro Release with Extended Context
description: Google released Gemini 3.1 Pro on February 19-20, 2026, featuring stronger code generation, more stable agent performance, and 1M-2M+ token context. Achieved 77.4% on SWE-bench Verified and 80.6% on SWE-Bench Verified. Won 12/16 benchmarks against Claude Opus 4.6 and GPT-5.2. ARC-AGI-2 score of 77.1% (doubled from 31.1%). Free for all users.

community_feedback.quote: Free for all users with higher quotas for Pro and Ultra subscribers
Surpassed Claude Opus 4.6 and GPT-5.2 in multiple benchmark tests

title: Background Agents in Slack Integration
description: Cursor released Background Agents integration with Slack, allowing users to launch agents directly from Slack by mentioning @Cursor. Agents can read threads, understand context, and create PRs without leaving the conversation.

community_feedback.quote: 用了 Cursor 的后台 Agent 一周了，真香。不用重复输提示，它自己创建 PR，还能在云端工作区跑。
这过程得烧掉多少 token 啊……我见过有人不到一周就烧了三四千刀。
